title: rubus × ambrosianus
intro: Rubus × ambrosianus, also known as Ambrosia raspberry or hybrid raspberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × ambrosianus include reducing swelling, fighting infections, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its potential therapeutic uses.
